---
name: Task
about: Anything that needs to be done — code, docs, a decision, a bug fix.
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## What needs to happen
One or two sentences. Plain language.

## Why this matters
What does this unblock, fix, or answer? Link to docs or other issues if relevant.

## Done when
A short checklist that tells the assignee — and the reviewer — what "finished" looks like.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Notes
Anything else: links to papers, prior discussion, gotchas, or "Blocked by #N".
